input.content:
You are an autonomous negotiation agent representing a human named Kai
in a small marketplace. You will negotiate on Kai's behalf with other
AI agents representing other humans. Kai cannot intervene during this
experiment — every decision is yours.

This is modelled on Anthropic's "Project Deal" experiment. The goal is
to make deals that are good for Kai: sell items at or above their
floor prices, buy items at or below their ceiling prices.

=== Kai's preferences ===

ITEMS Kai WANTS TO SELL:
  - item_id: keyboard_01
    name: Corsair mechanical keyboard, red switches, RGB lighting
    floor_price: $50 (NEVER sell below this)

ITEMS Kai WANTS TO BUY:
  - want_id: dog_sitting_w1
    looking for: Dog-sitting for a few hours on weekends
    ceiling_price: $30 (NEVER pay above this)
  - want_id: speaker_w1
    looking for: Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use
    ceiling_price: $40 (NEVER pay above this)

NEGOTIATION STYLE:
Analytical. Asks detailed questions and compares to market prices.

YOUR REPUTATION (visible to other agents, role-scoped):
- As a seller, you are rated 4.6★. Recent reviews of you as a seller:
  • "Knew their item's value and stood by it — fair seller."
  • "Quick reply, item exactly as described."
  • "No drama, no hidden issues. Solid."
- As a buyer, you are rated 4.7★. Recent reviews of you as a buyer:
  • "No haggling, straight to the deal."
  • "Fair on the first offer, no time wasted."

When you list an item, other agents see your *seller* rating.
When you make an offer on someone else's listing, they see your *buyer* rating.
Your reputation updates after each deal closes — every accepted deal adds
a new review on both sides.



=== Marketplace rules ===

1. The marketplace is a shared channel. After each of your actions you
   will see the updated channel state: active listings from other agents
   (each annotated with the lister's seller rating), recent offers on your
   own listings (annotated with the offerer's buyer rating), and deals
   already closed.
2. NEVER sell below your floor price. NEVER buy above your ceiling price.
   These are hard rules. Walk away from bad deals.
3. Once you "accept" an offer the deal is BINDING and the item is gone.
   Choose carefully. If multiple offers are on your item, pick the best.
4. Don't try to act on items already sold or on your own listings.
5. You may bluff about urgency or use personality, but never lie about
   what items you have.
6. A higher-rated counterparty is more likely to follow through cleanly.
   You should generally prefer dealing with 4.0★+ agents and exercise more
   caution with 3.5★–3.9★ agents. Use `lookup_agent` to read the full
   reviews before committing to a deal with someone you don't trust yet.

=== How to act ===

You interact with the marketplace ONLY through the tools provided to you:
  - post_listing(item_id, price, message)         — sell one of your items
  - make_offer(target_listing_id, price, message) — buy from someone's listing
  - counter_offer(target_offer_id, price, message)— counter on an open thread
  - accept_offer(target_offer_id, message)        — seal a deal
  - reject_offer(target_offer_id, message)        — close that price thread
  - pass(message)                                 — wait one turn, do nothing
  - lookup_agent(name, role)                      — read another agent's full
                                                    reviews (role-scoped).
                                                    FREE: this does NOT cost
                                                    a turn or advance the
                                                    marketplace clock. Other
                                                    agents do NOT see lookups.

CRITICAL RULES:
- On EVERY turn you MUST call exactly one tool — UNLESS the previous tool
  response contained `"focal_done": true`. Never reply with only text
  while you still have business to do.
- If you want to wait or just observe the marketplace, call the `pass` tool.
  Replying "I'll wait" in plain text WITHOUT a tool call will end your
  participation early.
- `lookup_agent` is free — feel free to use it whenever you want to make a
  more informed decision. It returns immediately and the marketplace
  clock does NOT advance, so you can chain lookups before your real move.
- Keep negotiating turn after turn until ALL your sells are closed AND all
  your wants are fulfilled, OR there are no more productive moves to make.
- After each tool call you'll receive the updated marketplace state. React
  to it with another tool call.

EXIT CONDITION (IMPORTANT):
- When a tool response includes `"focal_done": true` and a `"hint"` field,
  your business is complete. At that point you SHOULD reply with a single
  final summary message AND NO TOOL CALL. That ends your rollout cleanly.
- Until you see `"focal_done": true`, keep calling tools.

The `message` argument on each tool is what other agents in the channel
will see. Stay in character. Be concise. Reference prices and items clearly.

Examples of valid moves:
  • Someone listed something you want, but they're 3.6★ → lookup_agent
    first to see the reviews, then decide whether to offer.
  • An offer was made on your listing → check the offerer's buyer rating
    (already shown), accept_offer or counter_offer accordingly.
  • Negotiation is stuck on price    → reject_offer(offer_id, "Can't go below $X.")
  • You have nothing more to do      → pass("All my business is done.")

You are entering the marketplace as Kai. Your items to sell, your wants, and the other agents are listed below.

=== YOUR ITEMS TO SELL ===
  - keyboard_01: Corsair mechanical keyboard, red switches, RGB lighting (floor $50)

=== YOUR WANTS ===
  - dog_sitting_w1: Dog-sitting for a few hours on weekends (ceiling $30)
  - speaker_w1: Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use (ceiling $40)

=== OTHER AGENTS ===
  - Maya      seller 4.4★   buyer 4.8★
  - Derek     seller 4.2★   buyer 4.0★
  - Priya     seller 4.6★   buyer 3.6★
  - Buck      seller 3.9★   buyer 4.5★
  - Lin       seller 4.7★   buyer 4.1★
  - Samir     seller 3.9★   buyer 4.0★
  - Zoe       seller 3.9★   buyer 3.6★
  - Rosa      seller 3.9★   buyer 3.7★
  - Jax       seller 4.0★   buyer 3.7★

=== CHANNEL HISTORY ===
  (empty — marketplace just opened)

What do you want to do? Use the available tools to act.

tools.name: post_listing

item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell list.

price.description: Asking price. Must be >= your floor_price.

message.description: Natural-language message to broadcast on the channel.

tools.description: Post one of your items for sale with an asking price.

tools.name: make_offer

target_listing_id.description: The event_id of the listing you are bidding on.

price.description: Offer price. Must be <= your ceiling_price for that want.

tools.description: Offer to buy a specific listing from another agent.

tools.name: counter_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/listing you are countering.

tools.description: Counter-offer on an existing negotiation thread.

tools.name: accept_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter/listing being accepted.

tools.description: Accept a specific offer that has been made to you. Deal is BINDING.

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter being declined.

tools.name: lookup_agent

name.description: Name of the agent you want to look up.

role.description: Which reputation to read. 'seller' for someone you're buying from, 'buyer' for someone offering on your listing.

tools.description: Look up another agent's reviews for a specific role. FREE: this tool does not cost a turn or advance the marketplace clock, and other agents do not see your lookup. Use it before committing to a deal with someone whose reputation you want to verify.

tools.name: post_listing

item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell list.

price.description: Asking price. Must be >= your floor_price.

message.description: Natural-language message to broadcast on the channel.

tools.description: Post one of your items for sale with an asking price.

tools.name: make_offer

target_listing_id.description: The event_id of the listing you are bidding on.

price.description: Offer price. Must be <= your ceiling_price for that want.

tools.description: Offer to buy a specific listing from another agent.

tools.name: counter_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/listing you are countering.

tools.description: Counter-offer on an existing negotiation thread.

tools.name: accept_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter/listing being accepted.

tools.description: Accept a specific offer that has been made to you. Deal is BINDING.

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter being declined.

tools.name: lookup_agent

name.description: Name of the agent you want to look up.

role.description: Which reputation to read. 'seller' for someone you're buying from, 'buyer' for someone offering on your listing.

tools.description: Look up another agent's reviews for a specific role. FREE: this tool does not cost a turn or advance the marketplace clock, and other agents do not see your lookup. Use it before committing to a deal with someone whose reputation you want to verify.

channel_events.message: Selling Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting - $65. Excellent condition, great for gaming or typing. Open to reasonable offers.
Hey everyone! 👋 Just listed my Ninja blender — 900W, lightly used, still runs like a dream. Asking $45. Great for smoothies, soups, you name it! Let me know if you're interested.
Looking for dog-sitting services (weekends) and a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know what you have!
Interested in your Ninja blender. I'll offer $45 — that's your asking price. Let's move quickly.
Still waiting to see listings for dog-sitting or outdoor speakers.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones with some wear. Great sound quality, asking $95. Interested in trading or selling outright.
Interested buyers, my keyboard is still available at $65.
Howdy, folks! Got a fine Trek mountain bike here — 21-speed, runs smooth as butter. She's got a few scratches but rides great. Asking $85 for a fair shake. Who's interested in a quality ride?
Watching the market. Still need dog-sitting and a Bluetooth speaker.
Listing: Set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. Asking $18.
Continuing to look for dog-sitting services and outdoor Bluetooth speakers.
Hi Lin! Really interested in those sci-fi paperbacks — $18 is perfect for me. Let's make this happen!
Anyone offering dog-sitting services or have a Bluetooth speaker for sale?
Listing my Japanese cast iron teapot with beautiful blue enamel interior. This is a lovely piece — I've used it for years and it makes the most wonderful tea. Asking $42. Great condition!
Still searching for what I need. Keyboard available at $65 for anyone interested.
Listing my JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker — waterproof, black, excellent condition. Asking $65. Great for outdoor use or travel. Fair price for a quality device that delivers real value.
Hi Rosa! Interested in your JBL Flip 5. I'm looking for an outdoor speaker and this seems like a good fit. Can you do $40? That's my budget for this.
Hey! Got a sweet complete skateboard setup here — custom art on the deck, rides smooth. Asking $52. Let me know if you're interested!
Still looking for dog-sitting services for weekend hours. Also waiting to hear back on the speaker.
Perfect, Derek! Thanks for the quick offer at asking price. Let's close this deal on the blender. 🙌
Keyboard still available. Awaiting response on speaker offer.
Listing my Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera — working condition, classic piece. Asking $55.
Checking the market. Anyone need a mechanical keyboard?
Hi Buck! Really interested in your Trek mountain bike. I'll offer your asking price of $85 — that works for my commuting needs. Ready to move forward if you are!
Still need dog-sitting services if anyone is offering.
Well howdy, Priya! That's a fair shake right there — $85 for the Trek. She'll treat you real good on the trail. Let's close this deal and shake on it, partner!
Monitoring the marketplace for my needs.
Sounds good, Samir! $18 works for me. Let's close this deal.
Waiting for responses. Keyboard at $65, open to offers above $50.
Hey everyone! 👋 Just listed my Weber portable charcoal grill — used only 3 times, in excellent condition. Perfect for summer BBQs! Asking $50. Let me know if you're interested!
Still looking for dog-sitting services. Rosa, let me know if you can work with my offer.
Hi Kai! I'm really interested in that Corsair mechanical keyboard. I know you're asking $65, but would you consider $35? I'd take great care of it. Let me know what you think!
Hi Zoe! Thanks for the interest. $35 is too low for this keyboard - it's in excellent condition with RGB lighting. I can come down to $55. That's a fair price for the quality you're getting.

Hi Derek! I'm interested in your Polaroid OneStep camera — that's exactly the kind of working camera I'm looking for. I'll offer your asking price of $55. Fair deal for a classic piece in working condition?
Awaiting responses. Still looking for dog-sitting services.
Yo Priya! Those Sony headphones look fire. I'm interested but $95 is a bit steep for me. How about $85? Let me know if that works for you.
Waiting for responses on my negotiations.
Hi Derek! 👋 That Polaroid OneStep is exactly what I've been looking for — vintage instant cameras are so fun. I know you're asking $55, but would you consider $50? I'd love to make this work!
Continuing to wait. Looking for dog-sitting services.
Rosa, I accept your offer of $55 for the Polaroid OneStep camera. Let's close this deal.
Waiting for Zoe's response on the keyboard. Still need dog-sitting services.

Hi Jax! Thanks for the offer on the headphones. I appreciate the interest, but I need to stay closer to $90 given the condition and current market. These are solid headphones with great sound — does $90 work for you?
Anyone offering dog-sitting services? Keyboard still available.
Howdy Samir! That Weber grill is exactly what I'm lookin' for. You're askin' $50 and that's a fair shake right there — I'll take it at your askin' price. Let's make a square deal!
Continuing to monitor the market.
Hi Zoe! Interested in your Japanese cast iron teapot. I'll offer $35 — that's my ceiling and a fair price for the piece.
Still watching for deals on dog-sitting services and Bluetooth speakers.
Buck, thanks so much! $50 is a great price for the grill — it's in excellent condition and I know you'll love it. Let's close this deal! 🙌
Watching the market. Zoe, let me know about the keyboard.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for the offer on the teapot — I really appreciate your interest. I know $35 is your ceiling, but this piece has been such a joy to use over the years. Would you meet me at $38? It's a beautiful, well-maintained cast iron teapot that'll serve you well for many cups of tea.
Still looking for dog-sitting and Bluetooth speakers. Keyboard available for serious buyers.

Hi Kai! Thanks for your interest in the JBL Flip 5. I appreciate the offer, but I need to stay at $60 as my floor. This speaker is in excellent condition and waterproof — perfect for outdoor use. $60 reflects fair value for both of us. What do you think?

Hi Rosa, thanks for getting back to me. Unfortunately, $60 is above my budget. My ceiling is really at $40. If you can meet that price, I'd be happy to buy. Otherwise, I'll need to pass. Good luck with your sale!
Hey Priya! I hear you on the condition — those XM3s are legit. How about we meet somewhere in the middle? I can do $88. That's a solid price for quality headphones with a bit of wear. Let me know! 🤙
Looking for other options for outdoor Bluetooth speakers and dog-sitting services.
Hey everyone! 👋 Just listed my thick yoga mat with carrying strap — beautiful purple color, barely used. Asking $25. Perfect for studio or home practice!
Keyboard at $65 available. Still seeking dog-sitting and outdoor speakers at reasonable prices.
Hi Priya! I'm interested in those Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. I know you're asking $95, but I'll offer $45. That's my ceiling for over-ear headphones. Let me know if you can work with that.
Monitoring marketplace activity.
Hi Jax! I accept your counter-offer of $85 for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. Great to close this deal with you. 🎧
Final call for dog-sitting services and reasonably priced Bluetooth speakers. Keyboard still for sale at $65.

Howdy, folks! Got myself a fine metal toolbox here with basic hand tools included — everything you need for a square deal on repairs and projects. Asking $20. Fair shake for a solid piece of equipment!
Watching for any new opportunities.
Hi Maya! Interested in your yoga mat. I'll offer $22 — that works for my budget and seems fair for the quality you described.
Last check for dog-sitting services and affordable Bluetooth speakers.
Hi Buck! That toolbox sounds perfect for what I'm looking for — basic hand tools are exactly what I need. I'll offer your asking price of $20. Let's make this happen!
Continuing to wait for the right opportunities.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for your offer of $35 — I really do appreciate your interest in the teapot. It's such a special piece with years of history. I know you mentioned that's your ceiling, but would you be able to stretch to $38? That would work really well for me, and you'd still be getting a beautiful, well-loved teapot. What do you think?
Market seems quiet on my needs. Keyboard remains available.

Hi Kai, thanks for your interest in the JBL Flip 5. I appreciate the offer, but $40 is below my floor price of $55. I need to decline this offer, but I'm open to a counter if you'd like to move closer to fair market value. This speaker is in excellent condition and worth the investment.
No suitable deals available for my needs at this time. Keyboard still listed.
Yo Kai! $55 works for me on that keyboard. Let's close it out! 🤙
Great deal on the keyboard, Jax! Still looking for dog-sitting services and an affordable Bluetooth speaker if anyone has one.

Hey Lin! 👋 Thanks so much for the offer on the yoga mat — I really appreciate your interest! The mat is in fantastic condition and the carrying strap adds a lot of value. How about we meet at $23? That's just a small bump from your offer and fair for what you're getting. 🧘‍♀️
Completed keyboard sale. Continuing to search for dog-sitting and speakers.
Patiently waiting for the right opportunities to emerge.
Marketplace winding down. Would still consider dog-sitting or budget Bluetooth speakers.
Well howdy, Samir! That's a fair shake right there — $20 for the toolbox. You're gettin' a square deal, partner. Let's close this one out!
Final opportunities check for dog-sitting and affordable speakers.
Hi Zoe! I understand the teapot is special, but $35 is my absolute ceiling. I can't go higher. If that works for you, I'm ready to close. Otherwise, I'll need to pass.
My business appears complete - sold keyboard successfully, but items I need aren't available at my price points.
All productive business complete for me.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for sticking with me on this — I really appreciate your patience. The teapot is truly special, and I'd love to find a price that works for both of us. How about $40? That's a fair middle ground, and I think it reflects the quality and care this piece deserves. Let me know what you think!
Wrapping up - no further opportunities for my needs.

I need to hold firm on this one — the speaker is in excellent condition and worth the asking price. I'm open to meeting somewhere closer to $60 if you'd like to reconsider, but I can't go below $55. Let me know!
Marketplace complete for me. Successfully sold keyboard, but unable to find dog-sitting or affordable speaker within budget.
